creator: petr@petrovich.com.ua
text:
Submitter-Id:	current-users
 Originator:	Serge Negodyuck
 Organization:   
 Confidential:	no
 Synopsis:	Playing audio on some soundcards with pcm driver may hang machine.
 Severity:	serious
 Priority:	medium
 Category:	kern
 Class:		sw-bug
 Release:	FreeBSD 4.5-PRERELEASE i386
 Environment:
 System: FreeBSD petrovich.com.ua 4.5-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 4.5-PRERELEASE #11: Mon Dec 31 03:10:55 EET 2001 root@petrovich.com.ua:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/PETR i386

 fdc0: FIFO enabled, 8 bytes threshold

 psm0: model Generic PS/2 mouse, device ID 0
 vga0: <Generic ISA VGA>  at port 0x3c0-0x3df iomem 0xa0000-0xbffff on isa0

 sc0: VGA <16 virtual consoles, flags=0x200>
 ad0: 19546MB <FUJITSU MPG3204AH EF> [39714/16/63] at ata0-master UDMA100

 [end of dmesg]
 
 pcm0: Creative CT5880-C is integrated on motherboard AC'97 soundcard.
 It has one option in kernel: 
 
 device          pcm
 
 Description:
 
 When plaing audio of any kind ( e.g. with mpg123, xmms, various applications under X, vmvare, etc...) machine eventually hang.
 The time I can play audio differs. Sometimes I can listen mp3's for some hours, sometimes machine hangs in few minutes.
 There is nothing written on console. Machine totally hangs - keyboard, mouse, network not is not responding. However it does not recover, as mentioned below.
 
 The same problem was described on FreeBSD Stable List.
 ----------------------
 Date: Thu, 3 Jan 2002 23:49:01 -0500 (EST)
 From: David Vastine <dvastine@vastine.net>
 To: FreeBSD Stable List <freebsd-stable@freebsd.org>
 Hey all,
         A couple of make worlds ago, (I don't know the exact date for
 shame! ) probably on the order of a month or so, an audio problem popped
 up. If I play audio for any length of time, my machine will eventually
 hang.  I am usually using xmms or mplayer.  It happens less with xmms.
         The machine will be playing along then freeze, the note it is on
 keeps repeating... I can't move the mouse.. keyboard doesn't work.. can't
 ping the machine from another host.. totally frozen..  It does eventually
 recover after ~5 mins or so.
         After that first make world it was the worst, successive builds
 seem to be better but the problem is definately still there.  I am
 currently running a build from Dec 24.
         Can anyone offer help or point me in the direction of how to track
 down what is going on?
 
 Thanks,
 David
 
 To Unsubscribe: send mail to majordomo@FreeBSD.org
 with "unsubscribe freebsd-stable" in the body of the message
 -----------------------
 
 
  
 How-To-Repeat:
 	Not-repeatable in general case.
 	On some configurations we need to listen music withing soundcard for some hours.
 
 Fix:
 
   I think the problem is incorrect handling hardware interrupt of the soundcard.
   But it is only one of many possible reasons.
